organization.name: KYS Battery
organization.description: Chinese manufacturer of polymer pouch lithium-ion cells and AA/AAA rechargeable lithium batteries. Products serve consumer electronics: smart wearables, Bluetooth audio, cameras, GPS, medical devices, and power banks. Factory of 30,000 m² with 600+ employees and annual output exceeding 100 million cells.
